title: chrysanthemum leucanthemum var. gaudinii
intro: Chrysanthemum leucanthemum var. gaudinii, also known as the Pyrethrum or Gaudin's daisy, is a perennial flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of insects and bacteria due to the presence of pyrethrins, a group of natural insecticides. The health benefits of this plant include its use in reducing inflammation, fever, and pain, as well as its antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and prevent the growth of fungal infections. Chrysanthemum leucanthemum var. gaudinii is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
